---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# series-native-flora

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

[Native Flora](https://djnavarro.net/series-native-flora) is an art repository by Danielle Navarro, released into the public domain under a [CC0 licence](./LICENSE.md)
